params.milestoneAmounts: Optional array. Must sum to amount. Empty = single payment.

autoRelease(uint256).notice: Anyone can trigger auto-release after the 48h dispute window closes.

dispute(uint256).notice: Buyer disputes within the 48h window. Funds stay locked for arbitration.

refund(uint256).notice: Buyer reclaims funds if seller never submitted work before deadline.

release(uint256).notice: Buyer confirms work is good and releases payment.

releaseMilestone(uint256).notice: Buyer releases the next milestone slice. No work hash required per milestone.

submitWork(uint256,bytes32).notice: Seller submits SHA256 hash of their deliverable. Opens the 48h dispute window.
